items.question: Does DahNAY handle temperature-sensitive food cargo?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY runs end-to-end cold chain logistics for food and perishable cargo. We use refrigerated containers (reefers), temperature monitoring, climate-controlled warehousing, and continuous data logging to maintain product safety from farm to destination across domestic and export movements.

items.question: Can DahNAY manage bulk agricultural exports?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY handles bulk agricultural exports including grains, pulses, spices, oilseeds, and processed agro commodities. We coordinate farm-to-port logistics, fumigation, port handling, and ocean freight to global buyer markets, supporting major export hubs across India and Southeast Asia.

items.question: Does DahNAY ensure food safety compliance?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY's food logistics operations follow hygiene and safety protocols aligned with FSSAI standards in India, FDA requirements for US imports, and international food safety frameworks. We maintain temperature integrity, contamination-free handling, segregated storage, and full traceability documentation across cold-chain and dry-food shipments.

items.question: What packaging and handling standards does DahNAY use for food cargo?
items.answer: DahNAY uses food-grade packaging, contamination-free handling, and segregated storage to maintain product integrity through transit. Our protocols cover allergen separation, cross-contamination prevention, sealed reefer containers for perishables, and dedicated handling for organic and certified cargo to meet retailer and importer specifications.

items.question: Does DahNAY support seasonal agricultural shipments?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY scales operations around seasonal harvest cycles and demand peaks, including spice harvests, fruit and vegetable export windows, and grain shipping seasons. We coordinate increased reefer container availability, port slot planning, and surge warehousing to handle volume fluctuations without delay or cargo loss.
